hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.swift ]] && { swiftformat --config "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.swiftformat" "$f" 2>/dev/null; swiftlint lint --fix --path "$f" --config "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.swiftlint.yml" --quiet 2>/dev/null; }; }
hooks.statusMessage: Swift 자동 포맷 + lint fix 중...

hooks.command: AGENT_ID=$(jq -r '.agent_id // empty' < /dev/stdin); [ -z "$AGENT_ID" ] && exit 0; SHORT_ID=$(echo "$AGENT_ID" | cut -c1-8); WT_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/worktrees/agent-$SHORT_ID"; [ ! -d "$WT_DIR" ] && exit 0; cd "$WT_DIR" && DIFF=$(git diff HEAD) && NEW_FILES=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard); cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; [ -n "$DIFF" ] && echo "$DIFF" | git apply 2>/dev/null; if [ -n "$NEW_FILES" ]; then echo "$NEW_FILES" | while read -r f; do [ -f "$WT_DIR/$f" ] && mkdir -p "$(dirname "$f")" && cp "$WT_DIR/$f" "$f"; done; fi; BRANCH=$(cd "$WT_DIR" && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); git worktree remove "$WT_DIR" --force 2>/dev/null; [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && git branch -D "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; echo "WORKTREE_APPLIED_AND_CLEANED: agent-$SHORT_ID" >&2

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && xcodebuild build -project PairShot/PairShot.xcodeproj -scheme PairShot -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,id=264250BF-D45C-4121-B7AD-A915B6F8F2EA' SWIFT_TREAT_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS=YES SWIFT_STRICT_CONCURRENCY=complete -quiet 2>&1 | tail -20
